Links

Example

admin.instruction_1: Navigate to any tag page on the forum.
admin.instruction_2: An "Edit Sidebar" button will appear for users with permission.
admin.instruction_3: Click the button to open the editor, write content, then save.
admin.instruction_4: Assign the permission below to allow moderators to edit sidebar content.
admin.setting_position_help: On mobile the widget always appears below the post list.
admin.position_right: Right — next to the post list
admin.setting_content_type_help: Choose Markdown for safe, easy-to-write content. Choose HTML for full control (only trusted editors should have permission).
